description: You are an ERP Implementation Engineer migrating sales data to a new General Ledger system. Your goal is to build a financial transformation pipeline in the 'AdventureWorks2022' database that converts document-centric sales orders into normalized double-entry journal entries. Establish a 'Finance' schema including a 'Finance.ChartOfAccounts' table seeded with accounts 1100 (Accounts Receivable), 2100 (Tax Payable), 4001-4004 (Sales Revenue by Territory Group), and 4100 (Freight Revenue). Create a 'Finance.GeneralLedger' table to store transactions (JournalID, SalesOrderID, TransactionDate, AccountCode, Description, Debit, Credit) with non-negative constraints. Develop and execute a stored procedure 'Finance.usp_PostSalesToGL' for the period '2013-01-01' to '2013-03-31' that transforms SalesOrderHeader records into balanced GL entries by debiting AR (TotalDue) and crediting Revenue (SubTotal mapped by Territory Group), Tax (TaxAmt), and Freight (Freight). Provide a view 'Finance.vw_UnbalancedTransactions' to audit for any orders where the sum of debits does not equal the sum of credits.
